specific_question: Will Elexion Automotive's Asset Lifecycle Manager implement AI-powered lifecycle analytics by August 15, 2026, to optimize resource usage in EV production?
answer: Yes. According to Elexion Automotive's internal management plan, the asset management division is scheduled to deploy AI-powered lifecycle analytics by August 15, 2026.
dr_question: By Q3 2026, how can Elexion Automotive apply digital twins enhanced with AI-driven digital engineering capabilities to enable scalable customization of EV models for mid-income families, while maintaining sustainable resource usage and reducing production costs?
